entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI.
Am I speaking with Maria?
Thanks for letting me know, Sarah.
Hi there,
Are you calling for yourself or for someone else today?
Oh, sorry, this is actually Sarah Chen.
Please provide your date of birth.
I'm calling for myself.
Just to confirm, I have your name as Sarah Chen and your date of birth as March 15, 1988. Is that correct?
Sure, it's March 15, 1988.
If so, could you please spell your first and last name for me?
Sure, it's S-A-R-A-H, and the last name is C-H-E-N.
Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record? If so, please provide the number you have on file with us.
I'm not sure which number's on file. Could you look it up by my name and date of birth?
If you're not sure, just let me know.
Of course. It's Sarah Chen, S-A-R-A-H, C-H-E-N. And my birthdate is March 15, 1988.
No problem.
Of course. My last name is spelled C-H-E-N, and my date of birth is March 15, 1988.
To make sure I have it right, could you please confirm your first and last name and your date of birth one more time? Please spell them off for me.
Sure, it’s March 15, 1988.
Could you please spell your last name and confirm your date of birth as well? Thank you.
Yes, that’s correct.
Could you also confirm your date of birth for me? I have your phone number as 217-301-3971 and your date of birth as March 15, 1988. Is that correct?
Actually, I just need to cancel my appointment next Tuesday at 10 a.m. I’m not ready to reschedule yet.
I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.
Okay, I'll hold.

Would you like me to connect you to our patient support team? I can't cancel your appointment right now due to a system issue, but I'll let our clinic support team know you want to cancel your appointment next Tuesday at 10 a.m. They'll follow up with you as soon as possible.
Alright, I’ll hold.
Please hold while I document your request. I'm sending you to a representative. Please wait.
Goodbye.
Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.
